videos.headline: Billy Edwards Jr. floats beauty for opening Maryland TD
videos.description: Billy Edwards Jr. delivers a gorgeous 15-yard pass to Tai Felton, who snags the first touchdown of the game for the Terrapins.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Billy Edwards Jr. floats beauty for opening Maryland TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Montorie Foster Jr. takes sharp catch for a Michigan State TD
videos.description: Montorie Foster Jr. tumbles after 9-yard touchdown catch to even the score with Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Montorie Foster Jr. takes sharp catch for a Michigan State TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Billy Edwards Jr. dives for Maryland TD Run
videos.description: Billy Edwards Jr. powers through for a 7-yard touchdown run, diving into the end zone to secure 14-7 Maryland lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Billy Edwards Jr. dives for Maryland TD Run) 2024/09/07 ESHEET
